description.value:
Frequency once per hour

Your Hellknight training gives you the ability to focus your senses and root out those who would attempt to deceive or hide from you. For 1 minute, you gain a +2 status bonus to your Perception DC against attempts to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Create a Diversion], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Feint] you, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Lie] to you. During this time, if you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Seek] to locate a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Hidden] creature or to see through a creature's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Impersonate] attempt, you gain a +2 status bonus to the Perception check.
